# Functional Spec: Enterprise Administration

Prepared by: Krishna

# Summary

Currently Enterprise Administrators have to submit a request to add/remove Enterprise Administrators to their account, and CC Ops then configures this as per [here](https://dimagi.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/cc/pages/2146611235/CommCare+Subscriptions+-+Project+Space+Administration+Requests#Enterprise).

We want to make this fully self-service, so that Enterprise Administrators can directly do this.

# Problem Statement

While not frequent, Ops has to take on the steps of adding Admins for Enterprise partners.

Examples:
[ACCOUNTS-84438: FW: Catalog Task TASK0410173 has been assigned to group ServiceDesk](https://dimagi.atlassian.net/jira/servicedesk/projects/ACCOUNTS/queues/custom/84/ACCOUNTS-84438)
[ACCOUNTS-86888: Re: SCI Rwanda Project Space pause](https://dimagi.atlassian.net/browse/ACCOUNTS-86888)
[ACCOUNTS-84074: SPACE DEACTIVATION](https://dimagi.atlassian.net/jira/servicedesk/projects/ACCOUNTS/queues/custom/138/ACCOUNTS-84074)

Enterprise Admins also aren’t able to see who the current Admins are for their account.

# Proposed Solution

Currently the list of Enterprise Admin Emails is maintained only in the Accounting Admin interface, visible only to CommCare Ops:
![][image1]

Update so that these are also visible within the Enterprise Console
![][image2]

Add “See [Page: Enterprise Console | Enterprise Admins](https://dimagi.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/commcarepublic/pages/2143945885/Enterprise+Console#Enterprise-Admins) for more on Enterprise Admins”

Add the ability to add/remove Enterprise Admins here

[image1]: <data:image/png;base64,>

[image2]: <data:image/png;base64,>
